dashboard.label: RouterOS DNS Activity
dashboard.description: Overview of DNS queries and responses from Mikrotik RouterOS devices.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros eventtype=routeros_dns_query host=$host_filter$ | stats count
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros eventtype=routeros_dns_query host=$host_filter$ | stats dc(src)
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros eventtype=routeros_dns_query host=$host_filter$ | stats dc(query)
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros eventtype=routeros_dns_response host=$host_filter$ reply_code=NXDomain | stats count

panel.title: Queries Over Time by Record Type

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros eventtype=routeros_dns_query host=$host_filter$ | timechart count by record_type useother=f
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros eventtype=routeros_dns_query host=$host_filter$ | top limit=20 query | rename query as Domain, count as Count, percent as Percent

panel.title: Top NXDOMAIN Domains
panel.description: Correlates queries and responses by transaction_id + 5-minute bucket. Adjust the bucket if your DNS traffic exceeds ~65k queries per host per 5 min.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros (eventtype=routeros_dns_query OR eventtype=routeros_dns_response) host=$host_filter$ | eval bucket=floor(_time/300) | stats values(query) as query, values(reply_code) as reply_code by host transaction_id bucket | where reply_code="NXDomain" | top limit=20 query | rename query as Domain, count as Count, percent as Percent

panel.title: Top Querying Clients
panel.description: Hostname comes from the DHCP lookup populated by the 'Update DHCP Hostname Lookup' scheduled search. Shows '-' if no DHCP mapping is known for that IP.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros eventtype=routeros_dns_query host=$host_filter$ | stats count by src, src_nt_host | eval Hostname = if(isnull(src_nt_host) OR src_nt_host="", "-", src_nt_host) | sort -count | head 20 | rename src as IP, count as Count | table Hostname IP Count

panel.title: Top Clients by NXDOMAIN Responses
panel.description: Surfaces clients generating the most non-existent-domain responses. Useful for spotting DGA-style malware, misconfigured devices, or stale bookmarks.

search.query: index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros (eventtype=routeros_dns_query OR eventtype=routeros_dns_response) host=$host_filter$ | eval bucket=floor(_time/300) | stats values(reply_code) as reply_code, values(src) as src, values(src_nt_host) as src_nt_host by host transaction_id bucket | where reply_code="NXDomain" | stats count by src, src_nt_host | eval Hostname = if(isnull(src_nt_host) OR src_nt_host="", "-", src_nt_host) | sort -count | head 20 | rename src as IP, count as "NXDOMAIN Count" | table Hostname IP "NXDOMAIN Count"
index=$index_filter$ sourcetype=routeros eventtype=routeros_dns_query host=$host_filter$ | stats count by record_type | sort -count
